Parameter: Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Paddy: N: Yellowing of older leaves; P: Stunted growth, dark green leaves; K: Tip burn, rusty spots; Zn: Dust-like brown spots (Khaira)
Maize: N: V-shaped yellowing on older leaves; P: Purplish-red leaves; K: Yellowing/browning of leaf margins; Mg: Interveinal chlorosis; Zn: Whitish bands
Jowar: N: Stunted, pale yellowing; P: Purple leaves; Fe: Interveinal chlorosis
Bajra: N: Light green leaves; P: Stunted; Fe: Yellowing of young leaves
Finger Millet: Ca: Tip hooking/death of young leaves; N: General chlorosis; P: Dark green/purple
Wheat: N: Pale green/yellow leaves; P: Stunted, dark green/purple; K: Marginal chlorosis; Mn: Grey specks/streaks
Foxtail Millet: N: Pale leaves; P: Stunted growth
Kodo Millet: N: General yellowing; P: Purpling of leaf sheaths
Browntop Millet: N: Pale leaves; P: Stunted growth
